description: Black knee length tunic made of blended fabric, has a square neckline, pintucks on the shoulders and a concealed zipper on the left below the armhole Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required femella caters to every fashionista. This tunic from Femella is perfect for those who love the exotic. Pair it with high boots for a classy style. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
